finding: NO ALERTS - Package not indexed (private Verdaccio registry). Socket.dev cannot analyze packages not in the public npm registry.
verdict: MISS - Socket behavioral detection did not fire for private registry package
reason_for_miss: Package resolved from private registry http://verdaccio:4873 - Socket cannot fetch tarball to analyze postinstall behavior
lab_significance: Confirms gap in behavioral SCA: even tools that should detect postinstall exploits fail when package is from private/local registry
